chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1546 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Ali Akbar Shar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w M. Bux TEO (ES&HS), Ghotki. **** Learned AAG files statement on behalf of respondent No.3, which is taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner, who submits that purpose of this petition has been achieved; therefore, under instructions, he does not press instant petition, which his accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
